_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about the role vocabulary plays in building specialist knowledge, including understanding words that mean different things in everyday versus specialist contexts.

_source.w: We are learning about the role vocabulary plays in building specialist knowledge, including understanding words that mean different things in everyday versus specialist contexts.
y: Specialist vocabulary is the gateway to deeper understanding in every field of knowledge.
Recognising that words shift meaning across contexts prevents misunderstanding.
Building our academic and technical vocabulary is essential for success across all subjects.
eg: We explore how 'culture' means something different in everyday conversation versus in science (growing cultures in a lab).
We build glossaries of specialist terms for different subjects and note where meanings overlap or differ.
We discuss how learning the vocabulary of a field is inseparable from learning the field itself.
We analyse how authors use specialist vocabulary to establish authority and precision.
We practise using technical language accurately in our own writing across subjects.
We identify when everyday words are being used in specialist ways and explain the difference.
